For people and teams wanting to track, share, and manage projects.
Includes:
Unlimited free Contributors
Users that can view, comment, upload attachments, respond to update requests, and submit forms.
Gantt, table, board, and calendar view
View your projects, programs, tasks and work in the format that works best for you.
Rich formulas
Enable users to perform complex computations, link data across multiple sheets, and automate calculations with real-time updates.
Conversational AI features, including Smart Assist, Smart Columns, AI-powered dashboards and more
Surface risks, automate data analysis, and move work forward with AI features in the Smartsheet platform.
New
Unlimited sheets, forms, and reports
Data management and visualization features that allow easy collaboration, instant insights, and effective project tracking.
250 automations per month
Streamline tasks with automated reminders and update requests.

For businesses looking to align people, projects, and programs.
Includes Pro plan, plus:
Unlimited free Guests
Free users, external to the organization’s domains, who can edit and comment.
Timeline view
Visualize, plan, manage, and share date-based work.
Workload tracking
Essential features to see who's available, what they're working on, and to resolve overallocations.
Admin capabilities
Admins can efficiently manage users, groups, and licenses through the Admin Center.
Unlimited automations
Replace repetitive tasks across your organization with customizable, automated workflows.
Connect Smartsheet to external AI tools through MCP-enabled integrations
Connect Smartsheet to your organization's AI assistants and agents.

Even more storage to save all of your important files, docs, proofs, images, videos, and more.

For organizations needing to build complex solutions and company-wide security and controls.
Includes Business plan, plus:
Scenario Planning
View timelines alongside capacity and explore what-if scenarios without impacting live plans.
NEW
Portfolios
Standardize projects in one place and keep work consistent from intake to reporting.
NEW
SAML-based SSO
Enforce consistent login methods by restricting access options and providing users with the ability to log in through the organization's custom authentication service.
Enterprise Plan Manager
Manage multiple Smartsheet Enterprise accounts in a seamless, centralized and secure way.
Unlimited attachment storage
Unlimited storage so that you can have a source of truth for everything you do.
Directory integrations
Synchronize existing enterprise directory services with Smartsheet to provision and deprovision users.
Best value
Advanced Work Management
Total
/month
Custom pricing
Solutions for your needs
Custom pricing
Solutions for your needs
Contact us
For organizations aiming to manage large scale portfolios of work and connect across their systems.
Includes Enterprise plan, plus:
Control Center
Deliver consistent, visible projects, processes and programs at scale.
Dynamic View
Granular sharing controls enable business owners to share information to the right people, at the right time for viewing or editing.
Data Shuttle
Automate your data movement across platforms.
Connectors
Synchronize data across critical business systems.
DataMesh
Eliminate typos, duplicative data entry, and unnecessary work by mapping data between large sheets and reports.
Calendar App
An interactive and flexible calendar view that allows you to build shareable calendars with custom details.
Pivot App
Summarize and analyze large data stored in sheets or reports and create meaningful comparisons, patterns, and trends.
Premium Support
Live agent and AI-powered in-app chat, ProDesk coaching sessions, priority support with a first response time of 2 hours or less

Turn your data into a tailored dashboard instantly—from wherever you work
June 25, 2026 - Build dashboards, add new charts, and edit existing AI-powered charts from your connected AI tools
Oct 21, 2024
1 min read
Build new projects faster with AI, now generally available to Pro plans!
June 18, 2026 - Build a structured workspace in minutes, just by describing what you need.
Oct 21, 2024
1 min read
Smartsheet MCP-enabled connector for Amazon Quick now available
June 17, 2026 — Smartsheet is now available as a pre-built connector for Amazon Quick, giving teams instant access to their project data inside their organization's agentic AI workspace.
Oct 21, 2024
1 min read
Sort enhancements in table view, now generally available!
June 11, 2026 - We've made sorting more discoverable in table view!
Oct 21, 2024
1 min read
Smartsheet MCP-enabled connector for ChatGPT now available
June 11, 2026 - Smartsheet is now available as a pre-built connector in ChatGPT, giving teams instant access to their project data through natural language.
Oct 21, 2024
1 min read
Smartsheet MCP-enabled connector for Google Gemini now available
June 11, 2026 - Smartsheet is now available as a pre-built connector for Gemini, giving teams instant access to their project data through natural language and Google AI.
Oct 21, 2024
1 min read
View All
Smartsheet Gov
Doc Builder available in Smartsheet GOV
June 15, 2026 - Doc Builder now in Smartsheet Gov
Oct 21, 2024
1 min read
Data Shuttle Delete Workflows
September 2, 2025 - Ability to delete Data Shuttle workflows
Oct 21, 2024
1 min read
Modern forms submission experience with accessibility enhancements now available!
June 23, 2025 - This release focuses on the forms submission experience and marks a key milestone toward a modern, easy to use, and accessible forms experience.
Oct 21, 2024
1 min read
Export in Workspace Panel
May 13, 2025 - Initiate sheet, report, folder, and workspace exports from the Workspace Panel
Oct 21, 2024
1 min read
Notifications to Microsoft Teams channels in Smartsheet Gov
December 20, 2024 - Use notifications to Teams Channels to start transforming conversations into action in Smartsheet Gov.
Oct 21, 2024
1 min read
Changes to Data Shuttle Replace Mode Workflows
October 31, 2024 - Performance improvements to replace mode workflows
Oct 29, 2024
1 min read
Download Link Removed from Backup Emails
October 23, 2024 - Changes to backup service
Oct 29, 2024
1 min read
Backups Now Accessible Through Workspace Panel
September 26, 2024 - New location for backup service
Sep 30, 2024
1 min read
View All

Help Center
The Smartsheet Help Center is your central hub for learning, offering step-by-step help articles, how-to guides, and best-practice resources.
Help Center
Explore our categories
Account settings
Account management
Configure your personal and organizational settings.
Admin Center
Administer and govern your plan.
Authentication
Set up secure authentication and login methods.
Schedule view and approvals
Manage workloads, availability, and time and expense entries.
Security
Protect your account and data with access controls and compliance measures.
User management
Add, manage, and remove users within your organization.
AI in Smartsheet
Conversational AI
Learn how to interact with your data using our built-in assistant or external AI tools.
Analytics and insights
Create and manage reports
Pull data together to share key insights.
Time and expense tracking
Track time and expenses using Resource Management.
Building your solution
Attachments
Attach and manage files directly within sheets, rows, and comments.
Automated workflows
Replace manual, repetitive tasks with flexible, automated workflows.
Columns
Define, organize, and manage your data using columns.
Dashboards
Provide a real-time view of critical data and centralize information into one place.
Forms
Learn how to build forms to collect and act on data.
Formulas and functions
Build robust solutions with formulas.
Sheets and rows
Organize, track, and manage data within Sheets. Rows represent individual items or tasks within a sheet.
Templates
Pre-built solutions that save time, maintain consistency, and ensure best practices across projects.
Views
Visualize your project using timeline, board, grid, Gantt, card, and calendar views.
Widget
Configure widgets on dashboards to help organize data, track progress, and share insights with your team.
Workspaces
Organize, manage, and collaborate on all of your project-related content.
Connectors and integrations
Brandfolder apps and integrations
Integrate Brandfolder with other apps and platforms.
Bridge integrations
Connect your data across systems and automate routine tasks with Bridge.
Document builder
Generate documents using row data.
Google integrations
Connect Smartsheet with Google Drive, Docs, and Sheets to simplify document management and collaboration.
Microsoft integrations
Enhance productivity by connecting Smartsheet with Microsoft Teams, OneDrive, and Power BI.
Smartsheet connectors
Connect Smartsheet to other systems like Jira and Salesforce.
Smartsheet integrations
Integrate your Smartsheet account with over 100 popular business tools.
Creative asset management
Asset management
Manage your asset workflows and metadata.
Asset modal
Navigate the asset modal and maximize its features.
Brandfolder custom templating
Create branded materials and assets with templating.
Brandguide
Create straightforward guides for how to use brand assets.
Bulk Management
Save time with bulk editing tools.
Content Automation asset library
Create, customize, and manage brand assets at scale with multi-editing and bulk creation features.
Content Automation documents and projects
Organize and manage your creative collateral.
Content Automation templating
Enable users to generate on-brand materials using templates.
Introduction to Content Automation
Build consistent brand assets while empowering non-creatives to customize content.
Organizing assets
Learn how to manage and organize your assets.
Proofing
Review, edit, and approve images, videos, documents, and PDFs.
Premium features
Calendar App
Connect your Smartsheet data and forms to visualize your events in multiple views.
DataMesh
Sync and map data across multiple sheets.
Data Shuttle
Improve visibility and enable data-driven decisions by automatically moving data across platforms.
DataTable
Visualize and collaborate on large data sets by connecting many data sources.
Dynamic View
Share information with the right people at the right time for viewing and editing.
Mobile
Access Smartsheet from anywhere on your mobile device.
Pivot App
Summarize and dynamically refresh data.
Smartsheet Control Center
Standardize, automate, and scale project and portfolio management.
Resource Management
Getting started with Resource Management
Set up your Resource Management account and update account settings.
Create and edit projects
Build new projects to streamline project management and resource allocation.
Manage projects
Make updates to your projects.
Sharing and collaboration
Sharing assets and items
Share and collaborate on your work with the right people.
Conversations
Streamline your collaboration and communication with Conversations.
WorkApps
Accelerate collaboration across sheets, dashboards, reports, and more with WorkApps’ role-based views.
Account management
Configure your personal and organizational settings.
Admin Center
Administer and govern your plan.
Authentication
Set up secure authentication and login methods.
Schedule view and approvals
Manage workloads, availability, and time and expense entries.
Security
Protect your account and data with access controls and compliance measures.
User management
Add, manage, and remove users within your organization.

analysis.name: Smartsheet
analysis.tagline: Intelligent Work Management with AI at its core
analysis.value_proposition: Enterprise work management platform for managing projects, automating workflows, and building solutions at scale with AI-powered intelligence.
analysis.ideal_customer: Enterprise PMOs, IT portfolio leaders, operations teams, and services delivery organizations at mid-market to enterprise companies

differentiators: 3x Leader in the 2025 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Collaborative Work Management
AI at the core of work management platform
MCP-enabled connectors for major AI tools (ChatGPT, Gemini, Amazon Quick)
Enterprise-grade portfolio and resource management (Control Center, Resource Management)
Unlimited free Contributors and Guests on paid tiers

praised: McLaren Racing accelerated PMO efficiency and drives top-line growth with 58 day deployment

free_tier.limits: Free trial available; free Contributors and Guests included with paid plans

tiers.name: Pro
tiers.headline_inclusions: 1-10 Members, unlimited Contributors, Gantt/table/board/calendar views, AI features, 250 automations/mo

tiers.name: Business
tiers.headline_inclusions: 3+ Members, unlimited Guests and Contributors, timeline view, everything in Pro

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: Contact sales; advanced admin, security, and premium features

tiers.name: Advanced Work Management
tiers.headline_inclusions: Contact sales; scale, connect, and empower business with premium apps (Control Center, Resource Management, Bridge, WorkApps, DataMesh, etc.)

pricing.notes: Pro monthly $12/yearly $9 per Member; Business monthly $24/yearly $19 per Member; multi-currency pricing available (AUD, CAD, CHF, DKK, EUR, GBP, JPY, NOK, NZD, SEK, SGD, USD, ZAR); Pro capped at 1-10 Members, Business requires 3+ Members; premium features (Brandfolder, Resource Management, Bridge, WorkApps, Control Center, Pivot App) require Enterprise/Advanced Work Management tier
